name: Alchemist
description: Weak in combat but very good with poisons. Can't fight well; need good weapons.

name: Warrior
description: Most popular class. Strong, powerful, more intelligence than brute force characters.

name: Barbarian
description: Very powerful, huge fighters, but slow. Good at guarding places.

name: Sorcerer
description: Perfect for magic users. Snap your fingers and watch monsters burst into flames.

name: Sage
description: Like Sorcerers but with white magic. Turn a frog into a prince.

name: Assassin
description: Quick and fast thieves/fighters. Good fighters from distance, can be hired to kill.

name: Paladin
description: Average fighters who promote good. Good warriors who make kings and princes.

name: Cleric
description: Perfect magical class. Can heal themselves. Supposed to be good; evil clerics suffer.

name: Thief
description: Quick, smart, no conscience. Just the right class for those qualities.

name: Peddler
description: Outlets of anger for everybody. Not a good profession.

name: Soldier
description: Swift and decent fighters. Slaves of Paladins, usually middle alignment.

name: Ninja
description: Quick fighters who may easily become evil. No good ninjas exist.

name: Ranger
description: Well-rounded fighters with healing abilities. A safe default choice.

name: Monk
description: Average fighters, healers, and spell-casters. All-around average class.
